title: Confluence Page
description: Schema for a Confluence Cloud page resource as returned by the REST API v2. A page is the primary content type in Confluence, representing a wiki-style document within a space.

id.description: The unique identifier of the page. Represented as a string in the v2 API.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the page.

title.description: The title of the page. Must be unique within the space for current pages.

spaceId.description: The ID of the space this page belongs to.

parentId.description: The ID of the parent page. Null for top-level pages in a space.

parentType.description: The type of the parent entity.

position.description: The ordinal position of this page among its siblings in the page tree.

authorId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the user who originally created the page.

ownerId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the current page owner.

lastOwnerId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the previous page owner.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 date-time when the page was originally created.

Version.title: Version
Version.description: Version metadata for the content. Each edit creates a new version.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 date-time when this version was created.

message.description: An optional message describing the changes in this version.

number.description: The version number. Starts at 1 and increments with each update.

minorEdit.description: Whether this version was saved as a minor edit. Minor edits do not trigger notifications.

authorId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the user who created this version.

Body.title: Body
Body.description: The content body in one or more representation formats.

BodyRepresentation.title: Body Representation
BodyRepresentation.description: A single representation of the content body.

representation.description: The name of this representation format.

value.description: The content body in this representation format.

Label.title: Label
Label.description: A label used to categorize and organize content in Confluence.

id.description: The unique identifier of the label.

name.description: The display name of the label.

prefix.description: The prefix indicating the label scope.

ContentProperty.title: Content Property
ContentProperty.description: A key-value property stored on content for app-specific or custom metadata.

id.description: The unique identifier of the property.

value.description: The value of the property. Can be any valid JSON value.

Operation.title: Operation
Operation.description: An operation that can be performed on content.

targetType.description: The target type for the operation.

Like.title: Like
Like.description: A like on the content by a specific user.

accountId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the user who liked the content.

PageLinks.title: Page Links
PageLinks.description: Hypermedia links associated with the page.

webui.description: Relative path to view the page in the Confluence web UI.

editui.description: Relative path to edit the page in the Confluence editor.

tinyui.description: Shortened relative path for sharing the page.

PaginationLinks.title: Pagination Links
PaginationLinks.description: Links for cursor-based pagination through result sets.

next.description: URL for the next page of results, including the cursor parameter.

base.description: The base URL of the Confluence instance.
